artPrompt: The dramatic moment a stern investigator's gloved hands seize a sealed metal ballot box, thrust toward the viewer in hard foreshortening, an evidence tag dangling blank and torn. A pair of dice spill glowing from the slot, trailing arcane cyan sparks; behind, towering filing cabinets and cold municipal light cast slashing diagonal shadows across the ivory floor, kinetic and tense, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Seize the Ballot Box as Evidence
text: Gain control of target artifact, or of target creature with a die, coin, ballot, or snack in its name or type, until end of turn. It's being held as evidence. Untap it. It gains haste. After all, evidence must be thoroughly examined.
flavorText: The Mayor's loaded dice are now Exhibit A. And Prim intends to roll them.

extras.interaction: steals the rival deck's dice/ballot artifacts
